description: Starter library of contextual elicitation questions keyed by domain, adapted for enterprise, higher education, ERP systems, and general digital products. Adapt wording to context — these are seeds, not scripts.
feature_request: What business problem are we solving — and who feels the pain most?
Which KPI is impacted if we don't build this?
What does success look like 3 months after launch?
Why is this solution preferred over alternatives?
higher_education_systems: Which specific student information system (SIS) is the system-of-record (e.g., iSAMS, PowerSchool)?
How does student, staff, or grade data synchronize between iSAMS/PowerSchool and Toddle/LMS (real-time API or scheduled batch)?
What is the source of truth for student enrolment statuses when conflict arises?
Are there specific academic scheduling constraints, multi-campus divisions, or curriculum frameworks (e.g., IB, Cambridge) to accommodate?
How are grade locks, report card approvals, and transcript generation handled currently?
erp_integration_odoo: Which Odoo version is under scope (e.g., v13, v15, v18) and are we using Odoo Enterprise or Community?
What custom modules or third-party integrations (e.g., Shopify, custom shipping, external CRM) does this Odoo backend interact with?
What is the exact workflow for stock adjustments, product catalog synchronization, or multi-warehouse replenishment?
How are finance and automated invoicing synced with local accounting or tax regulations?
Who is the system owner for core ERP master data (products, customers, vendors)?
data_governance: What is the system-of-record and downstream systems for this dataset?
What specific data validation, data lineage, or master data management (MDM) rules apply?
What are the data privacy requirements (e.g., GDPR, PDPA, local cyber-security regulations) regarding PII (Personally Identifiable Information)?
How are data conflicts or duplicate customer/student profiles resolved and audited?
Are there historical data retention, archival, or purging policies?
reporting: Who uses the report, and how frequently?
What decision depends on this report?
What is difficult with the current reporting process?
Would a live dashboard serve the user better than a static export?
payment: What happens if payment fails mid-checkout?
Who owns the refund flow — Finance, CS, or automated?
What payment methods are in scope (card, wallet, bank transfer, instalment)?
approval_process: Who approves — single approver or multi-level?
Can approval be delegated when the approver is on leave?
What's the SLA for approval decisions?
notification_system: Which channels are required — push, SMS, email, in-app?
What happens if delivery fails — retry, fallback channel, or drop?
Are there rate limits or quiet-hours per user?
data_export: Who needs the export, and how often?
What fields are mandatory vs optional?
Is the export sensitive — PII, financial, or grade data?
Would a dashboard or API serve the user better than a file download?
integration: Which external system is the integration target?
Is it real-time (sync API), near-real-time (webhook), or batch?
What's the fallback when the external system is down?
Who owns the integration contract — our team or the partner?
ai_feature: What specific learner or operator problem will AI solve?
What does 'good AI output' look like — and who judges it?
What happens when the AI is wrong — who catches it and how?
Is AI the only solution, or could better search/filtering achieve the same outcome?
What data does the AI need, and is it available and clean?
